[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100010 3
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 11000000 2
5 11000101 4
6 11100101 5
7 01100011 4
